prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical Chinese promotional infographic poster about unlocking comic creation logic with GPT-2, using a playful hand-drawn editorial style.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 poster, warm off-white textured paper background, soft pastel palette, slightly grainy risograph print texture, rounded friendly shapes, dark teal headline typography, coral accent text, pale green/yellow/pink/lavender section cards.

Layout: Left side is a bold text-heavy headline and feature list; right side is a large illustration of an open padlock with a glowing keyhole releasing comics, sketches, speech bubbles, arrows, and diary pages. Bottom right has an open comic book, with pages and comic panels swirling upward from it into the lock area. Keep generous margins and a lively but readable composition.

Text content: Use a large Chinese headline at top left: 漫画的\n创作逻辑. Under it, add smaller bold Chinese copy: 就这么水灵灵的被\nGPT-2 解锁了, with “GPT-2” in large coral red and the rest in dark teal/black. Add a green underline and smaller line: 这个思路，真是让人好生喜欢. Include small decorative coral sparkle marks and a hand-drawn heart near the tagline.

Feature cards: Place exactly 4 rounded horizontal cards stacked vertically on the lower left, each with one circular icon on the left and bold Chinese label on the right. Card 1 is pale green with an open notebook and pencil icon, label 日记转. Card 2 is pale yellow with a lightbulb rising from an open book icon, label “知识转”. Card 3 is pale peach with a steaming mug icon containing a heart, label “鸡汤转”. Card 4 is pale lavender with a paper airplane icon, label “各种转换，\n玩的飞起”. From each of the 4 cards, draw one dotted arrow pointing right toward the flying comic materials; use matching muted arrow colors.

Right-side subject details: Draw exactly 1 oversized open padlock in muted green-gray, positioned upper right, with chalk-like doodles on its body: tiny speech bubbles, comic thumbnails, and simple character sketches. Insert exactly 1 golden key into the keyhole; the key has a fountain-pen nib as its handle, symbolizing writing unlocking comics. Make the keyhole glow with warm yellow light.

Flying comic materials: Show exactly 6 loose paper/comic elements floating from the open book toward the lock: 1 small portrait sketch sheet, 1 four-panel comic page, 1 single-page layout with a yellow image block, 1 two-character dialogue comic page, 1 small pink note page, and 1 larger horizontal comic strip page. Add curved motion trails, sparkles, tiny hearts, arrows, and speech bubbles around them, but keep the main count of loose sheets exactly 6.

Bottom illustration: Draw exactly 1 open comic book at the lower right with visible comic panels and a cute simple character on the left page; use thin dark teal linework and pale yellow highlights. Add soft cloud-like pale green shapes along the bottom edge of the poster.

Visual style: Cute Chinese social-media poster aesthetic, hand-drawn line art, rounded sans-serif Chinese typography, vintage print grain, pastel accents, clean hierarchy, whimsical educational tone.

Constraints: Maintain the exact 4 feature cards and exact 6 loose flying paper/comic elements. Do not add extra major sections, extra logos, watermarks, QR codes, or English explanatory text beyond “GPT-2”.

Goal: Create a vertical Chinese promotional infographic poster about unlocking comic creation logic with GPT-2, using a playful hand-drawn editorial style.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 poster, warm off-white textured paper background, soft pastel palette, slightly grainy risograph print texture, rounded friendly shapes, dark teal headline typography, coral accent text, pale green/yellow/pink/lavender section cards.

promptZh:
目标：创作一张竖版中文宣传信息图海报，以趣味手绘编辑风格展示如何用 GPT-2 解锁漫画创作逻辑。

画布：竖版 3:4 海报，暖米色纹理纸背景，柔和的马卡龙色调，带有轻微颗粒感的孔版印刷质感，圆润友好的形状，深青色标题字体，珊瑚色强调文本，浅绿/浅黄/粉色/淡紫色板块。

布局：左侧为醒目的文字标题和功能列表；右侧为一幅大型插图，画着一把打开的挂锁，锁孔发出光芒，释放出漫画、草图、对话框、箭头和日记页面。右下角有一本打开的漫画书，页面和漫画分镜从书中向上盘旋进入锁区。保持宽裕的留白，构图生动且易读。

文本内容：左上角使用醒目的大号中文标题：漫画的\n创作逻辑。下方添加较小的加粗中文文案：就这么水灵灵的被\nGPT-2 解锁了，其中“GPT-2”使用大号珊瑚红色，其余部分使用深青色/黑色。添加一条绿色下划线和较短的文案：这个思路，真是让人好生喜欢。在标语附近添加装饰性的珊瑚色小闪光符号和手绘爱心。

功能卡片：在左下方垂直堆叠 4 张圆角横向卡片，每张卡片左侧有一个圆形图标，右侧为加粗中文标签。卡片 1 为浅绿色，配有打开的笔记本和铅笔图标，标签为 日记转。卡片 2 为浅黄色，配有从书中升起的灯泡图标，标签为“知识转”。卡片 3 为浅桃色，配有冒热气的爱心马克杯图标，标签为“鸡汤转”。卡片 4 为淡紫色，配有纸飞机图标，标签为“各种转换，\n玩的飞起”。从 4 张卡片各引出一条虚线箭头指向右侧飞出的漫画素材；使用相匹配的柔和箭头颜色。

右侧主体细节：在右上角绘制 1 把巨大的浅绿灰色开锁挂锁，锁身上有粉笔画风格的涂鸦：微小的对话框、漫画缩略图和简单的角色草图。在锁孔中插入 1 把金色钥匙；钥匙柄为钢笔尖形状，象征着书写解锁漫画。让锁孔发出温暖的黄色光芒。

飞出的漫画素材：展示 6 个从打开的书本向锁孔漂浮的纸张/漫画元素：1 张小型肖像草图纸、1 张四格漫画页、1 张带有黄色图像块的单页布局、1 张双人对话漫画页、1 张粉色小纸条和 1 张较大的横向漫画条。在它们周围添加弯曲的运动轨迹、闪光、小爱心、箭头和对话框，但保持漂浮纸张的总数为 6 个。

底部插图：在右下角绘制 1 本打开的漫画书，左页可见漫画分镜和一个可爱的简笔角色；使用细深青色线条和浅黄色高光。在海报底部边缘添加柔和的云朵状浅绿色形状。

视觉风格：可爱的中文社交媒体海报美学，手绘线条艺术，圆润的无衬线中文字体，复古印刷颗粒，马卡龙色点缀，清晰的层级，奇思妙想的教育风格。

约束：保持 4 张功能卡片和 6 个飞出的纸张/漫画元素。不要添加额外的重大板块、额外 Logo、水印、二维码或除“GPT-2”之外的英文解释性文字。
